description: A square text-only designed graphic from the U.S. Department of Labor. The background is a deep navy blue with a large, faint, watermark-style rendering of the DOL seal filling the canvas (the words 'DEPARTMENT OF LABOR' and 'UNITED STATES OF AMERICA' are faintly legible around the embossed circular seal). A small crisp DOL seal sits centered at the top. The body text is set in bold white serif type in two paragraphs: 'The Trump Administration is fully committed to reopening the government for the American People.' and 'At the Department of Labor, we will continue doing as much as we can to put American Workers First during the Democrat Shutdown.' No photos or illustrations. Propaganda technique: an official statement card that blames the government shutdown on Democrats ('Democrat Shutdown') while positioning the administration as the side fighting for 'American Workers First.' Target audience: the general public and the administration's supporters during the October 2025 funding lapse.
notable_text: The Trump Administration is fully committed to reopening the government for the American People. At the Department of Labor, we will continue doing as much as we can to put American Workers First during the Democrat Shutdown.
